pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Correct the maven compiler source and target properties to 11 (fixing typo 1.11).
Uncomment the Kotlin Spring compiler plugin to enable Spring support in Kotlin.
Remove the maven-assembly-plugin configuration, likely replaced by Spring Boot repackaging.
Remove the deprecated JCenter repository from the project configuration.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web dependency to replace the previous HTTP client setup.
Remove the Fuel HTTP client dependencies as they are replaced by Spring Web.
Switch from generic oidc-support to oidc-spring-support for Spring integration.
Add oidc-test-support dependency for testing OIDC functionality.
Add Mockito core dependency for unit testing.
Downgrade WireMock version, possibly for compatibility with new test dependencies.

README.md.general_idea: Update the Maven dependency coordinates in the README to reflect the new artifact ID and version property naming convention.
Remove detailed Java/Kotlin usage examples and instantiation code from the README to simplify documentation.
README.md.human_impl: Removed code blocks showing AltinnrettigheterProxyKlientConfig and klient.hentOrganisasjoner usage.

README.md.general_idea: Refine the introductory description and build instructions for clarity and conciseness.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Bibliotek som tilbyr en Http klient...' to 'Biblioteket som tilbyr en klient...' and removed jar file output details.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace the Fuel HTTP client library with Spring's RestTemplate for making HTTP requests.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Removed Fuel imports and replaced `httpGet`/`responseObject` calls with `RestTemplate.exchange`.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update imports to use Spring Web and Core classes instead of Fuel and OIDC context classes.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Added imports for `org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate`, `HttpEntity`, `HttpHeaders`, etc., and removed Fuel imports.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor authentication logic to use a utility class for retrieving tokens instead of passing TokenContext directly.
Change method signatures to remove TokenContext and Subject parameters, relying on context utilities instead.
Update the return type of the organization fetching methods to match the new model class.
Implement URI construction using Spring's UriComponentsBuilder instead of string concatenation.
Create helper methods to construct HTTP headers for different endpoints.
Simplify error handling logic by relying on RestTemplate's exception propagation and basic status code checks.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Replaced complex Fuel result parsing with simple `if (respons.statusCode != HttpStatus.OK)` checks and try-catch blocks.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update the logger to reference the new error handler class.
Remove the unused Subject data class to clean up the model.
Rename AltinnReportee to AltinnOrganisasjon to better reflect its semantic meaning.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Renamed `data class AltinnReportee` to `data class AltinnOrganisasjon`

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Changed the visibility of a constant from private to public to allow external access.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: private const val CORRELATION_ID_MDC_NAME = "correlationId" -> val CORRELATION_ID_MDC_NAME = "correlationId"

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Consolidate WireMock client imports into a wildcard import for brevity.
Move ISSUER_SELVBETJENING constant import to a new utility package location.
Add imports for OIDC context and validation classes required for new authentication handling.
Add imports for OIDC request context holder and validation context.
Add import for JWT token generator used in test setup.
Consolidate JUnit imports into a wildcard import.
Add import for Mockito JUnit runner to enable mock injection.
Add imports for Spring RestTemplate and Builder to support new client construction.
Annotate test class with MockitoJUnitRunner to handle mock initialization.
Introduce mocked OIDCRequestContextHolder and RestTemplateBuilder to inject into client constructor.
Update client instantiation to pass the new context and builder arguments.
Replace static token context with dynamic JWT generation and mocked OIDC validation context in setup.
Remove obsolete test cases related to fallback logic and error handling that are no longer applicable or tested differently.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Removed multiple @Test methods for fallback and error scenarios

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Rewrite remaining test to use inline WireMock stubs and verify requests directly instead of utility functions.
Update method call under test to remove token context and subject arguments, relying on injected context instead.
Remove unused constants and static token context from companion object.
